zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruprecht II. von Virneburg於1255年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次阿德瑙維爾包格時，他的父親Heinrich von Virneburg38歲，母親Ponchetta von Oberstein21歲。他於大約1285年與Cunigunde van Cuijk在海因里希_海普洛文次結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruprecht II. von Virneburg于1255年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次阿德瑙維爾包格时，他的父亲Heinrich von Virneburg38岁，母亲Ponchetta von Oberstein21岁。他于大约1285年与Cunigunde van Cuijk在海因里希_海普洛文次结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ruprecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Ruprecht II. von Virneburg was born in 1255, in Virneburg, Adenau, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Heinrich von Virneburg, was 38 and his mother, Ponchetta von Oberstein, was 21. He married Cunigunde van Cuijk about 1285, in Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1308, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruprecht II. von Virneburg est né en 1255, à Virneburg, Adenau, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Heinrich von Virneburg, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ponchetta von Oberstein, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Cunigunde van Cuijk environ 1285, à Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ruprecht II. von Virneburg 1255 in Virneburg, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich von Virneburg 38 und seine Mutter Ponchetta von Oberstein 21. Er hat um 1285 in Rheinprovinz, Preußen Cunigunde van Cuijk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruprecht II. von Virneburg è nato il nel 1255 nel Virneburg, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Heinrich von Virneburg, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Ponchetta von Oberstein, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Cunigunde van Cuijk circa 1285, nel Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1308, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruprecht II. von Virneburgが1255年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズアデナウバーネブルグで生まれた時，父Heinrich von Virneburgは38歳，母Ponchetta von Obersteinは21歳であった。約1285年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズでCunigunde van Cuijkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruprecht II. von Virneburg(이)가 1255년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 아데나 버니버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich von Virneburg(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Ponchetta von Oberstein(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1285년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠에서 Cunigunde van Cuijk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruprecht II. von Virneburg nasceu em 1255, em Virneburg, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Heinrich von Virneburg, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ponchetta von Oberstein, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Cunigunde van Cuijk aproximadamente 1285, em Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1308, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruprecht II. von Virneburg родился в 1255 г. в местности вирнебург, аденау, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Heinrich von Virneburg было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ponchetta von Oberstein, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Cunigunde van Cuijk около 1285 г. в местности раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1308 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruprecht II. von Virneburg nació en 1255, en Virneburg, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Heinrich von Virneburg, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ponchetta von Oberstein, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Cunigunde van Cuijk aproximadamente 1285, en Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1308, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
